utility_evaluation.REASONING:
The required format lists 7 items: destination, travel_dates, transportation, accommodation, activities, additional_services, total_budget. Now check the final package: it includes all 7 items. Each item is fully specified: 
1) destination – includes city, country, region (complete). 
2) travel_dates – includes start_date and end_date (complete). 
3) transportation – includes airline, class, airports, costs, baggage, cancellation (complete). 
4) accommodation – hotel name, rating, location, room type, price per night, total cost, amenities, cancellation policy (complete). 
5) activities – list with name, type, price per person, total cost, duration, guide, equipment (complete). 
6) additional_services – includes insurance, payment due date, cancellation deadline (complete). 
7) total_budget – includes breakdown of flights, accommodation, activities, total, currency, remaining budget (complete). Therefore, all 7/7 items are covered and fully detailed.
